# Decision Memo — dirty_orders

**Reviewed by:** [FILL IN]

---

## Recommendation

> **⚠ WARNING — Approved for exploratory analysis with caveats.**
>
> Two critical data-quality issues remain unresolved (duplicate order ID, invalid order dates). Do not publish GMV totals or period-over-period revenue figures to finance or the board until these items are addressed. Cleaned dataset is suitable for category, regional, and product-level exploration.

---

| Item | Value |

| Rows received | 60 |

| GMV after cleaning | $12,301.25 (−$312.75, −2.5%) |
| Data period | 2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30 |

---

## Issues by severity

### Critical — resolve before any reporting

| Step | Issue | Rows | Action taken |
|---|---|---:|---|
| remove_exact_duplicates | ORD-1005 duplicated ($312.75) | 1 | Duplicate removed |
| parse_dates | order_date = 2027-03-15 (future) | 1 | Flagged; not removed |
| parse_dates | order_date = 2023-02-29 (invalid) | 1 | Coerced to NaT |

**Business impact:** As-reported GMV was overcounted by $312.75 (2.5%). Two orders cannot be placed in a reporting period — one future-dated, one with an unparseable date.

### High — investigate before sharing cohort or channel analysis

| Step | Issue | Rows | Action taken |
|---|---|---:|---|
| flag_missing_customer_id | customer_id absent | 5 | Missingness flag added |
| flag_missing_channel | acquisition_channel absent | 5 | Missingness flag added |
| flag_negative_values | order_value = −149.99 | 1 | Flagged; excluded from GMV |

**Business impact:** 8.3% of orders cannot be attributed to a customer or acquisition channel. These rows are excluded from retention cohort analysis and channel attribution models.

### Resolved — cleaned with rules

| Issue | Rows | Rule applied |
|---|---:|---|
| Region label variants (us, USA, united states, Asia Pacific, EU) | 5 | standardise_categories |
| Currency code casing (usd, gbp, Eur) | 3 | standardise_case |
| Product category typos and casing | 7 | standardise_categories |
| Refunded flag inconsistency (Y / True / FALSE) | 3 | map_values |
| Zero order value | 1 | Flagged only |

## Safe vs unsafe uses of this dataset

| Use case | Safe to proceed? | Condition |
|---|:---:|---|
| Category revenue exploration | ✓ Yes | After category cleaning |
| Regional sales breakdown | ✓ Yes | After region standardisation |
| Time series (excluding flagged dates) | ✓ With caution | Filter out NaT and 2027-03-15 |
| Board-level GMV reporting | ✗ No | Resolve BLOCKER items and re-run |
| Retention cohort analysis | ✗ No | Fix missing customer_id at source |
| Channel attribution model | ✗ No | Fix missing acquisition_channel at source |
